name: accuracy
description: This device magically increases the wielder's accuracy.

name: evasion
description: This device magically increases the wielder's ability to avoid attacks.

name: hurting
description: An enchantment on this device causes the wielder to do more damage.

name: defence
description: Magically warded, this device protects the user from physical hurt.

name: stability
description: This device weakens hostile magic before it can affect the wearer.

name: flame
description: This weapon burns with magical fire.

name: sparks
description: Sparks crackle from this lightning-infused weapon.

name: cold
description: The air is chilly around this cold-infused weapon.

name: venom
description: Dripping with toxic fluids, this weapon poisons its wielder's foes.

name: haste
description: This amulet helps you move around faster.

name: alacrity
description: This amulet helps you act faster.

name: smiting
description: This weapon can help knock foes away from you and into each other.

name: thunder
description: This weapon strikes with the power of a thunderclap.

name: resistance
description: This device protects you from fire and poison.

name: immunity
description: This device renders you immune to poisons.

name: extinguishing
description: You can't be hurt by fire while wearing this.

name: swordplay
description: While using this, you have both extra accuracy and exta evasion

name: sorcery
description: This amulet empowers your wands.

name: sorcerous fire
description: This exotic weapon burns with a magic flame that empowers your wands.

name: viciousness
description: A brutally damaging weapon that hits extra hard an accurately.

name: invulnerability
description: This deluxe armor protects you from blows, magic, and even fire and poison.
